mapper.select: SELECT SUM(CNT) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) CNT FROM MCP_USER WHERE 1=1 AND USERID = #{checkId} UNION SELECT COUNT(*) CNT FROM NMCP_USER_HST WHERE 1=1 AND USER_ID = #{checkId} AND USER_STTUS = '4' AND HST_CHG_DT IS NULL UNION SELECT COUNT(*) CNT FROM MCP_REC_USER WHERE 1=1 AND USERID = #{checkId} )
SELECT COUNT(PIN) FROM MCP_USER WHERE 1=1 AND PIN = #{pin}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO MCP_USER_AGENT USING DUAL ON (USERID = #{userid}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET MINOR_AGENT_NAME = #{minorAgentName} --미성년자 법정대리인 성명 , MINOR_AGENT_RRN = #{minorAgentRrn} --미성년자 법정대리인 생년월일 , MINOR_AGENT_CI = #{minorAgentCi} --미성년자 법정대리인 CI , AGENT_AUTH_INFO = #{agentAuthInfo} --인증정보 , MINOR_AGENT_AGREE = #{minorAgentAgree} --미성년자 법정대리인 개인정보 수집이용 동의여부 , SYS_RDATE = SYSDATE --등록 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( USERID --회원아이디 , MINOR_AGENT_NAME --미성년자 법정대리인 성명 , MINOR_AGENT_RRN --미성년자 법정대리인 생년월일 , MINOR_AGENT_CI --미성년자 법정대리인 CI , AGENT_AUTH_INFO --인증정보 , MINOR_AGENT_AGREE --미성년자 법정대리인 개인정보 수집이용 동의여부 , SYS_RDATE --등록 ) VALUES ( #{userid} , #{minorAgentName} , #{minorAgentRrn} , #{minorAgentCi} , #{agentAuthInfo} , #{minorAgentAgree} , SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(PIN) FROM NMCP_USER_HST WHERE 1=1 AND PIN = #{pin} AND USER_STTUS = '4' AND HST_CHG_DT IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NMCP_SNS_LOGIN_TXN ( SNS_LOGIN_SEQ , USER_ID , SNS_CD , SNS_ID , CRET_DT , USE_YN ) VALUES ( SQ_SNS_LOGIN_SEQ.NEXTVAL , #{userId} , #{snsCd} , #{snsId} , SYSDATE , 'Y' )
mapper.select: SELECT USERID , NAME FROM MCP_USER WHERE 1=1 AND PIN = #{pin} AND STATUS = '1'

SELECT USERID , PASSWORD , NAME , AUTH_CODE , EMAIL , POST , ADDRESS , ADDRESS_DTL , MOBILE_NO , BIRTHDAY , SYS_RDATE , LOGIN_COUNT , STATUS , USER_DIVISION , SMS_RCV_YN , EMAIL_RCV_YN , PIN , GENDER , PWD_CHG_DT , CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG FROM MCP_USER WHERE 1=1 AND USERID = #{userId} AND STATUS = '1'
mapper.insert: insert into MCP_MRKT_HIST( USERID, GUBUN, STRT_DTTM, END_DTTM, AGR_YN, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM, MKT_AGR_REFERER ) values ( #{userid}, #{gubun}, #{strtDttm}, #{endDttm}, #{agrYn}, #{userid}, sysdate, #{userid}, sysdate, #{mtkAgrReferer} )
